title: NEPL/Seplat JV Drives Educational Development in Communities through SEED Initiative - FinancialEDGE
description: The NNPC Exploration and Production Limited (NEPL) and Seplat Energy Joint Venture (JV) have once again reinforced their dedication to advancing education and promoting excellence in its host communities through their flagship initiative, the Seplat Educational Empowerment Drive (SEED). The initiative, focused on driving meaningful change through educational interventions in the areas of infrastructure
